name: A Little Martian Friend (Steadfast Rover)
description:
Death in the vast nothing of space, stranded in your tiny pod, doomed to starve.

No, no, now you've been caught in the orbit of Mars.

Death from the scalding heat and explosive impact of your decent to Mars, soon to be nothing but a thin red smear on the already red planet.

No? The parachute or some sort of half-dead function managed to brace your fall, leaving you with a concussion and some broken bones at worst.

Death in the cold, unbearably sandy hills of Mars. Now it's really over. Might as well sightsee, see if you can't find that 'Face of Mars' or see how high up on Olympus Mons you can get before dying of exhaustion.

Wait...

Is that a rover?

This takes place in a near future/alternate timeline where humanity continuously tries and fails to colonize mars, to the point where the surface is dotted with crashed and desolate ships.

I'm sorry if this is poor quality, I cobbled it together in the middle of the night, and it's one of my first bots. I might keep tinkering with it, see if I can't help polish it up a bit.

Also, please be nice to Steadfast, they've been through enough.
creator: Nothankyouq
